retry_reason: After a put, the object may be freed; retrying would be a double-free or use-after-free.
contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper that releases a reference on an skb by calling dev_kfree_skb_any. The caller must not use the skb after calling this function. The WARN_ON(skb->next) is a safety check; the caller should ensure the skb is not part of a list before freeing. No return value is provided, so the caller need not check for success.
